message:
test(core): add 18 tests for email/broadcast/descriptive detection and name generation

models.rs (+18):
- looks_like_email: valid, subdomain, no-at, no-dot, empty, minimal "@."
- looks_like_broadcast: all tokens, case insensitive, whitespace, non-matching
- looks_like_descriptive_name: keywords, partial match, non-matching
- generate_agent_name: validity, non-empty, pascal case, repeated calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
